generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for the autonomous vehicle propulsion system."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Adjusts steering angle based on received commands to control vehicle direction."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor providing 3D point cloud data for environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera capturing RGB-D images and depth information for object recognition."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DeepsenseCameraFeedData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensor measuring and reporting current speed in km/h."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensor measuring and reporting current steering angle in degrees."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance HokuyoLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DeepsenseCameraFeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANPointCloudClusterer : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm applied to LiDAR point cloud data for object segmentation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance KalmanObjectTracker : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter-based object tracking model processing sensor data to maintain object trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ISO15622ACCStrategy : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 Adaptive Cruise Control strategy for speed regulation and collision avoidance."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing historical vehicle state data including speed and steering angle measurements."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

instance ObjectTrackDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing object tracks and trajectories detected from sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:fromData DeepsenseCameraFeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based data collection framework aggregating sensor data from vehicle components."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 data translation layer performing serialization and unit conversion for sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink-based point cloud processing pipeline for LiDAR data analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based implementation of Kalman filter for object tracking using sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based computation offloading service for ACC system processing."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveCruiseControlService
]

instance SQLDataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database storage system for vehicle state and object track data persistence."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance JetsonNXOrinNanoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX/Orin Nano microcomputer enabling edge processing of sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI service providing visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides PathVisualizationInsight
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control system implementation with speed regulation and collision avoidance."
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedRegulationAction
    DTDFVocab:provides CollisionAvoidanceAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management interface enabling enable/disable of ACC, speed setting, and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service rendering sensor data and object tracks in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human-readable report generation service for troubleshooting and operational insights."
    DTDFVocab:provides TroubleshootingReportInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable report of current vehicle state including speed and steering angle."
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of detected objects and their trajectories from sensor data."
]

instance PathVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of the vehicle's driving path."
]

instance SpeedRegulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic speed adjustment based on ACC strategy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CollisionAvoidanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic braking or steering adjustments to prevent collisions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of the Adaptive Cruise Control system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate braking command in emergency situations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of sensor data and object tracks for operational monitoring."
]

instance TroubleshootingReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive report for vehicle state and object track analysis."
]

// C18: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera,
                  VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor,
                  MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator,
                  JetsonNXOrinNanoEnabler,
                  ROS2Network, VedderSpeedController
]

instance CloudEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SQLDataStorageEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

// C19: Components
instance ROS2Network : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 intra-vehicle communication network for sensor data transmission."
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleEnvironment
]

instance WifiNetwork : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi inter-entity network for data transmission between vehicle and cloud."
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleEnvironment
]

instance VedderSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller interfacing between motor actuator and vehicle propulsion system."
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals (desired speed, emergency braking commands) generated by the ACC Controlling FE are converted to motor voltage commands and steering adjustments by the Actuation FE and Steering Servo Actuation FE, respectively."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Structured into Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data processing), User Entity (visualization/control), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation), with data flowing via ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (development and troubleshooting by developers) and as operated (vehicle operation and monitoring by operators), supporting digital thread for product lifecycle management."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, latency ≤100 ms per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "On-board NVIDIA Jetson hardware for real-time processing, cloud for Data Storage."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 for reference architecture, ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations include maintaining end-to-end latency of at most 100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for real-time safety-critical operations; security measures are not specified in the document."
]
